Levi
Video editor, motion designer & graphic designer based in Haifa. Creative Lead at Kendago.

About
Hello! My name is Ariel.

I studied Visual Communication at Bezalel Academy of Arts and Design (2017–2021).

I'm passionate about storytelling through video editing, motion design, graphic design, image-making, and film. I love bringing ideas to life with bold visuals and thoughtful movement.
Skills
After Effects Premiere Illustrator Photoshop Indesign AI Tools

Bezalel
Selected works from my B.Des in Visual Communication at Bezalel Academy of Arts and Design — film, motion, graphic design, illustration, photography and more. 2017–2021.
01
Out of Sight — Final Project
2021 · Film / Animation
My final project at Bezalel. Animated clip about our dreams — frame by frame technique. The clip emphasizes the stream of consciousness and the irrational randomness we experience in dreams. Based on real dreams.
02
Asgardia
2020 · Branding / Motion
Asgardia — a city in the sky. A branding campaign for a micronation event celebrating the relocation to space. What will you take to space? Includes motion, invitation print and flying tickets.
Print materials coming soon
Invitation design
Flying ticket
03
A Perfect Day for Banana Fish
2020 · Title Sequence
Title sequence design inspired by J.D. Salinger's short story. Typography, motion and atmosphere.
